title: AI application for drafting meeting minutes and action plans
excerpt: Do you know any app within Monday that generates meeting minutes and can be integrated with my boards?

posts.author: Edi (Edi Danilo)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you know any app within Monday that generates meeting minutes and can be integrated with my boards?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
It is in beta, but yes!! https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/28017211500434-monday-com-AI-Notetaker
